name: pprof
description: Tool for visualization and analysis of profiling data (github.com/google/pprof)

options.name: -callgrind
options.description: Outputs a graph in callgrind format

options.name: -comments
options.description: Output all profile comments

options.name: -disasm
options.description: Output assembly listings annotated with samples

options.name: -dot
options.description: Outputs a graph in DOT format

options.name: -eog
options.description: Visualize graph through eog

options.name: -evince
options.description: Visualize graph through evince

options.name: -gif
options.description: Outputs a graph image in GIF format

options.name: -gv
options.description: Visualize graph through gv

options.name: -kcachegrind
options.description: Visualize report in KCachegrind

options.name: -list
options.description: Output annotated source for functions matching regexp

options.name: -pdf
options.description: Outputs a graph in PDF format

options.name: -peek
options.description: Output callers/callees of functions matching regexp

options.name: -png
options.description: Outputs a graph image in PNG format

options.name: -proto
options.description: Outputs the profile in compressed protobuf format

options.name: -ps
options.description: Outputs a graph in PS format

options.name: -raw
options.description: Outputs a text representation of the raw profile

options.name: -svg
options.description: Outputs a graph in SVG format

options.name: -tags
options.description: Outputs all tags in the profile

options.name: -text
options.description: Outputs top entries in text form

options.name: -top
options.description: Outputs top entries in text form

options.name: -topproto
options.description: Outputs top entries in compressed protobuf format

options.name: -traces
options.description: Outputs all profile samples in text form

options.name: -tree
options.description: Outputs a text rendering of call graph

options.name: -web
options.description: Visualize graph through web browser

options.name: -weblist
options.description: Display annotated source in a web browser

options.name: -call_tree
options.description: Create a context-sensitive call tree

options.name: -compact_labels
options.description: Show minimal headers

options.name: -divide_by
options.description: Ratio to divide all samples before visualization

options.name: -drop_negative
options.description: Ignore negative differences

options.name: -edgefraction
options.description: Hide edges below <f>*total

options.name: -focus
options.description: Restricts to samples going through a node matching regexp

options.name: -hide
options.description: Skips nodes matching regexp

options.name: -ignore
options.description: Skips paths going through any nodes matching regexp

options.name: -intel_syntax
options.description: Show assembly in Intel syntax

options.name: -mean
options.description: Average sample value over first value (count)

options.name: -nodecount
options.description: Max number of nodes to show

options.name: -nodefraction
options.description: Hide nodes below <f>*total

options.name: -noinlines
options.description: Ignore inlines

options.name: -normalize
options.description: Scales profile based on the base profile

options.name: -output
options.description: Output filename for file-based outputs

options.name: -prune_from
options.description: Drops any functions below the matched frame

options.name: -relative_percentages
options.description: Show percentages relative to focused subgraph

options.name: -sample_index
options.description: Sample value to report (0-based index or name)

options.name: -show
options.description: Only show nodes matching regexp

options.name: -show_from
options.description: Drops functions above the highest matched frame

options.name: -showcolumns
options.description: Show column numbers at the source code line level

options.name: -source_path
options.description: Search path for source files

options.name: -tagfocus
options.description: Restricts to samples with tags in range or matched by regexp

options.name: -taghide
options.description: Skip tags matching this regexp

options.name: -tagignore
options.description: Discard samples with tags in range or matched by regexp

options.name: -tagleaf
options.description: Adds pseudo stack frames for labels key/value pairs at the callstack leaf

options.name: -tagroot
options.description: Adds pseudo stack frames for labels key/value pairs at the callstack root

options.name: -tagshow
options.description: Only consider tags matching this regexp

options.name: -trim
options.description: Honor nodefraction/edgefraction/nodecount defaults

options.name: -trim_path
options.description: Path to trim from source paths before search

options.name: -unit
options.description: Measurement units to display

options.name: -functions
options.description: Aggregate at the function level (granularity)

options.name: -filefunctions
options.description: Aggregate at the function level (granularity)

options.name: -files
options.description: Aggregate at the file level (granularity)

options.name: -lines
options.description: Aggregate at the source code line level (granularity)

options.name: -addresses
options.description: Aggregate at the address level (granularity)

options.name: -cum
options.description: Sort entries based on cumulative weight

options.name: -flat
options.description: Sort entries based on own weight

options.name: -seconds
options.description: Duration for time-based profile collection

options.name: -timeout
options.description: Timeout in seconds for profile collection

options.name: -buildid
options.description: Override build id for main binary

options.name: -add_comment
options.description: Free-form annotation to add to the profile (displayed on some reports or with pprof -comments)

options.name: -diff_base
options.description: Source of base profile for comparison

options.name: -base
options.description: Source of base profile for profile subtraction

options.name: -symbolize
options.description: Controls source of symbol information

suggestions.name: fastlocal
suggestions.description: Only get function names from local binaries

options.name: -tls_cert
options.description: TLS client certificate file for fetching profile and symbols

options.name: -tls_key
options.description: TLS private key file for fetching profile and symbols

options.name: -tls_ca
options.description: TLS CA certs file for fetching profile and symbols

options.name: -http
options.description: Provide web interface at host:port (host defaults to localhost, port defaults to a random available port)

options.name: -no_browser
options.description: Skip opening a browser for the interactive web UI

options.name: -tools
options.description: Search path for object tools

options.name: -all_frames
options.description: Ignore drop_frames and keep_frames regexps in the profile (rarely needed, mainly used for debugging pprof itself)

options.name: -inuse_space
options.description: Same as -sample_index=inuse_space

options.name: -inuse_objects
options.description: Same as -sample_index=inuse_objects

options.name: -alloc_space
options.description: Same as -sample_index=alloc_space

options.name: -alloc_objects
options.description: Same as -sample_index=alloc_objects

options.name: -total_delay
options.description: Same as -sample_index=delay

options.name: -contentions
options.description: Same as -sample_index=contentions

options.name: -mean_delay
options.description: Same as -mean -sample_index=delay

name: -h
-help
--help
options.description: Show help for pprof

args.name: source
args.description: Binary and/or profile source(s): local profile file, URL like http://host/profile, or a saved profile
